creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Timur I. Bakeyev from comment #20)
> I'd rather stick the port to the original ldb package and let Samba and SSSD to coexist independently. That's the main reason, why ldb is now a bundled lib in Samba.

Sorry, can you explain? I don't understand that this means. Why do you prefer bundling ldb?
